# BP-135 variant positive: a GORM handler uses the global handle for First.
lang: go
file: BP-135-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-global-first
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var DB *gorm.DB

type User struct{}

func getUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var user User
	DB.First(&user)
}
